plugins.name: cloop-notify-slack
plugins.description: Send cloop task completion notifications to a Slack channel via incoming webhook
plugins.author: cloop-community

plugins.name: cloop-lint-go
plugins.description: Run golangci-lint on the workspace after each task and annotate the plan with findings
plugins.author: cloop-community

plugins.name: cloop-deploy-docker
plugins.description: Build and push a Docker image tagged with the current plan version after a successful run
plugins.author: cloop-community
